channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: No. 13 Michigan State Grabs Close Road Win Over No. 8 Purdue, 76-74
item.description: No. 13 Michigan State survived Braden Smithâs missed 3-point attempt with a second to play for a 76-74 win over No. 8 Purdue.

item.title: Lionel Messi Tracker: Inter Miami Star Knocked Over By Fan In Chaotic Friendly
item.description: Tracking Lionel Messi's goals and top moments for Inter Miami and the upcoming FIFA World Cup.

item.title: Alex Palou, McLaren, Ganassi Settle Lawsuit after $12M Ruling
item.description: Alex Palou & Co. can look ahead to the 2026 INDYCAR season now that one major roadblock is behind them.

item.title: NFL Combine: How NIL Has Made It Harder â And Easier â To Scout QBs
item.description: Identifying the right QB has always been hard for NFL teams. League sources elucidate how that challenge is much different in the NIL era, for better ...

item.title: bet365 Bonus Code: Bet $5, Get $150 with Code FOX365
item.description: Claim the bet365 Sportsbook promo code which give you $150 in bonus bets.

item.title: Knueppel sets rookie 3-pt. record -- in 59 games
item.description: Kon Knueppel broke Keegan Murray's NBA rookie record for 3-pointers, making his 207th on Thursday night against the Pacers.

item.title: OSU's Styles wows with 43.5-inch combine vertical
item.description: Projected top-10 pick Sonny Styles posted the best vertical jump by an off-ball linebacker at the combine since 2003 and also dazzled with a 4.46 time...

item.title: Source: Bills re-signing special teamer Franklin
item.description: The Buffalo Bills are re-signing special teams player and safety Sam Franklin Jr. to a three-year deal, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

item.title: Sources: Trump, college leaders to meet March 6
item.description: Conference commissioners are expected to join sports celebrities and dignitaries on March 6 in a roundtable discussion with President Donald Trump abo...

item.title: Preview for the 2026 PLL, WLL Championship Series: Key players, schedule, predictions
item.description: The top four teams in men's and women's lacrosse square off for the Sixes crown.
